user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: A hearty traditional American breakfast with scrambled eggs, crispy bacon, golden pancakes, and seasoned hash browns — comforting and filling.
fields.description: Scrambled eggs cooked soft and fluffy, two strips of crisp bacon, a stack of two buttermilk pancakes served with butter and maple syrup, and a side of seasoned, golden hash browns. Optional: add a side of fresh fruit or grilled tomatoes for brightness.
fields.suggested_prep: Cook bacon until crisp and keep warm. Whisk eggs with a splash of milk, salt, and pepper; cook gently while folding to keep them soft. Prepare pancakes from a buttermilk batter, cook until golden, and stack with a pat of butter and maple syrup. Pan-fry shredded potatoes with a little onion, salt, pepper, and paprika until crisp. Plate eggs, bacon, pancakes, and hash browns together and serve immediately.
fields.nutrition_note: High in protein and calories; provides quick energy from pancakes and sustained protein from eggs and bacon. Pair with fruit or reduce portion sizes of pancakes and bacon to balance saturated fat and added sugars.

result.reasoning: Day 7 breakfast already contains Greek-themed items; adding a Classic American Breakfast Plate as a POI appended to Father > Day 7 > Breakfast offers a clear alternate 'classic American' option for that day.
